channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: In front of 17 Glengall Road, 11th July
item.description:
2 bin liner full of waste dumped on 8/7, then gradually other waste, such as wooden boards, armchair with cushions and other wastes started appearing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Deep freezer dumped in east end of date street, 11th July
item.description:
Deep freezer dumped in east end of date street, photo taken 9.45pm Saturday July 11th. Smells horrific

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Date Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, top AND side, 11th July
item.description:
Black spray paint on grey painted metal surface of street cabinet. Found on Crystal Palace Road at the junction with Anerley Hill, by Brunswick Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Station Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned MPV - Red Vx Zafira On Burnell Av, 11th July
item.description:
MJ11 MYO Red Vx Zafira has been left abandoned on the corner of Burnell Av to upper wickham lane for 6 weeks now, its not SORN and has tax and MOT however R/S mirror is broken off (mirror is going foward towards bonnet , shouldn't go that far in any case) and high mileage therefore i believe the owner dumped it as escalating issues
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnell Avenue, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle traffic light facing wrong direction, 11th July
item.description:
The traffic light for South-West-bound cycles has been rotated and is not visible from the stopping point. Intersection of Lea Bridge Road and Leyton High Road(A112)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hoe Street, Leyton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Human puke on the street, attracting flies, 11th July
item.description:
It's on a cul-de-sac, next to the pavement. Health hazard specially for the many toddlers living in the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Devonshire Place, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on top of bin, 11th July
item.description:
Silver/white pen graffiti tag on top of bin at "Belvedere Road" bus stop on Maberley Road, opposite number 51

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repair never was any good and has worsened., 11th July
item.description:
Originally repaired by SGN at request of MP. Repair sank and has recently worsened. Passed traffic is damaging our houses as it crosses over the now pot hole dip in the repair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on top of street cabinet, 11th July
item.description:
Black pen on grey painted metal of street cabinet, found opposite 47 Maberley Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped suitcase left in Gilroy Way, 11th July
item.description:
Beginning of Gilroy Way / Bournewood Road underneath tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haydens Close, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, 11th July
item.description:
Black spray paint on grey painted metal of the street cabinet by 39 Maberley Road. Various tags of same author

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street weeds, 11th July
item.description:
On the north west side of Maberley Road, between numbers 35-39, there's a lot of Street weeds here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Work not being undertaken, 11th July
item.description:
This major junction is allegedly closed for 11th and 12th July. As can be seen by the photo work is not being done and so this is likely to overrun again as it has the last twice work has been done on this by Thames Water

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lanes, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box tipped on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
By bus stop found outside St Paul Church on Hamlet Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By wheelie bins at entrance to Claremont road, 11th July
item.description:
A pile of clothes dumped next to wheelie bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: By wall Claremont court on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
A pallet and wood dumped by wall near Claremont court facing the railway line -

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Dead fox in the road. Has been placed in a blue bin bag, 11th July
item.description:
Dead fox that needs removing - is in a blue bin bag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Clarendon Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table fly tipped on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
Apologies for no photo with this report, but a table has been fly tipped on the pavement of Belvedere Road with Anerley Grove. Check both Belvedere Road and Anerley Grove around this junction please as it keeps moving around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped building waste, 11th July
item.description:
Dumped building waste including broken glass has been there for at least a month. Have to walk my kids past this every day. Drain next to it also looks totally blocked, maybe cement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmerston Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of plastic bin & shopping bag, both filled with rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
On pavement outside 47 Belvedere Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
